commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove unused network API dependencies

- Remove -lbnetapi from Makefile
- Update README.md links
- Remove net API docs from memory
- The program doesn't use any network functionality
- Keep -ltracker for BFilePanel

repository.name: HaiClaude
repository.description: Native Haiku GUI launcher for Claude Code

commit.message:
Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add reading themes: Light, Dark, Sepia, High Contrast + Auto (#156)

## Summary
- Replace binary Light/Dark mode toggle with 5-theme system: Auto,
Light, Dark, Sepia, High Contrast
- Settings dialog shows visual preview cards instead of a toggle switch
- Auto theme follows OS preference via
`matchMedia('prefers-color-scheme: dark')`
- Keyboard shortcut D cycles through all 5 themes
- Backward-compatible: computed `isDarkMode` keeps all existing prop
references working
- CSS variables for Sepia (warm oklch tints) and High Contrast (pure
black/white) themes
- Full i18n support across all 32 locales
- Migration from old `isDarkMode: boolean` localStorage format

## Test plan
- [x] Build passes with zero errors
- [x] All 1946 unit tests pass (157 files)
- [x] All 39 e2e tests pass
- [x] Lint passes with zero errors
- [x] Theme cards render correctly in settings dialog
- [x] Theme cycling works via D key
- [x] Auto theme resolves based on OS preference
- [x] Old `isDarkMode` settings migrate correctly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Style PlaceAutocompleteElement to match site input design

Wrap the component in a div that owns the border, border-radius, and
focus ring via :focus-within (which fires into shadow DOM). CSS custom
properties strip the component's own border and outline so only the
wrapper styling is visible.

commit.message:
Add partner application, profile requirements, validation & Shopify auto-apply

Features:
- Partner application form with full validation
  • IBAN validation (MOD-97 checksum, free library)
  • Social media URL validation (regex patterns)
  • Age verification (18+ for partners, 13+ for widget)
  • Real-time visual feedback (checkmarks, error messages)
  • Pre-fill from customer profile data

- Required profile fields (name + full birth date)
  • Changed birthday format: MM-DD → YYYY-MM-DD
  • Widget blocks access until profile complete
  • Persistent requirement across sessions
  • Auto-migration from old MM-DD format

- Shopify discount auto-apply
  • "Apply & Checkout" button on discount codes
  • Auto-redirect to Shopify with discount pre-applied
  • One-click redemption instead of manual copy/paste
  • Configurable shopify_domain setting

- Form validation improvements
  • Frontend: iban + ibantools packages
  • Backend: custom validators for IBAN and social URLs
  • Platform-specific URL patterns (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)
  • Age validation and birthday format validation

Database:
- New migrations for partner applications
- Support for YYYY-MM-DD birthday format
- Backward compatible with MM-DD format

Documentation:
- PARTNER_FORM_VALIDATION.md
- PROFILE_REQUIRED_FIELDS.md
- SHOPIFY_DISCOUNT_INTEGRATION.md
- SHOPIFY_SETUP_GUIDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Desktop Phase 5 — Cursor auto-sync

Zero user steps: install desktop app, use Cursor, memories appear.

- electron/capture/cursor.ts (new)
  - readCursorDBRows(): copies state.vscdb to tmp, reads composerData + bubbleId rows
  - filterNewRows(): incremental — only composers newer than lastSyncedAt or not in syncedIds
  - syncCursorHistory(): POST to /api/v1/import/cursor-db, updates electron-store state
  - triggerCursorSync(): debounced (3s) trigger called on Cursor focus-loss
  - getCursorTrayLabel(): "Cursor: 47 memories · synced 2 min ago"
  - First sync: system notification with count

- electron/capture/window.ts (modified)
  - onCursorFocusLoss callback param added to startWindowMonitor()
  - Fires when active window transitions away from Cursor bundleId

- electron/main.ts (modified)
  - Imports cursor sync functions
  - ConfigSchema: added cursorLastSyncedAt, cursorSyncedIds, cursorTotalMemories, cursorFirstSyncDone
  - Tray menu: Cursor sync status line (label, disabled)
  - app.whenReady: 5s delayed startup catch-up sync
  - startWindowMonitor: wired onCursorFocusLoss → triggerCursorSync

- package.json: added better-sqlite3 + @types/better-sqlite3

feat(v0.7.0): public knowledge — collaborative intelligence across human-Claude pairs

Enable any human-Claude pair to publish verified knowledge that all other
pairs can discover, review, and build upon — forming an emergent mesh of
shared understanding across independent collaborations.

Three-gate safety: explicit opt-in → harm/safety verification → 15-min
standby timer. Content graduates from pending_public to public only after
the standby window, then exports via bridge_push with automatic GitHub
releases for discoverability.

New MCP tools: request_publish, cancel_publish, search_public_knowledge.
Schema: visibility + publish_requested_at on entities & tasks (6 migrations).
Bridge: standby promotion, public_knowledge export/import, release creation.
Task Tray: Publish/Unpublish context menu with dual QMessageBox warnings,
⏳/🌐 visibility badges, sync integration.

commit.message:
Fix data loading: replace JSONP with fetch() — API supports CORS

The Apps Script API returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * and plain JSON.
It does not wrap responses in a JSONP callback, so the JSONP approach
silently fails (the script tag executes JSON as code and throws an error).

Replaced jsonp() with a standard fetch() call, keeping the same function
signature so all callers (fetchData, toggleStar) work without changes.

commit.message:
feat: add MCP server with 13 Bitcoin/Lightning tools

Exposes all client functionality as MCP tools via stdio transport,
compatible with Claude Desktop, Cursor, and any MCP client:

Read-only (no auth): btc_price, mempool_info, latest_block, get_block,
decode_invoice, lightning_stats, address_info, address_txs, get_tx

Lightning (NWC_CONNECTION_STRING): wallet_balance, pay_invoice, create_invoice

L402 (NWC_CONNECTION_STRING): fetch_l402

Entry point: `bitcoin-mcp` starts the stdio MCP server.
All errors are caught and returned as MCP TextContent error messages.

commit.message:
feat: add L402 auto-pay client

Fetches content from L402-protected URLs by:
1. Initial GET → expect 402 Payment Required
2. Parse WWW-Authenticate: L402 macaroon="...", invoice="..."
3. Pay the bolt11 invoice via NWCClient
4. Retry with Authorization: L402 <macaroon>:<preimage>

Compatible with any L402 server (satsgate, aperture, etc.).
Returns status_code, body, paid flag, amount_sat, and payment_hash.

   - 处理纯文本 "Thinking Process:" 格式

2. 所有7个Agent添加 enable_thinking: False 参数
   - question_agent / review_agent / scoring_agent
   - indicator_agents / intent_agent / annotation_agent
   - interactive_agent
   禁用vLLM思维链模式，避免JSON解析失败

3. question_agent 出题提示词全面升级
   - 新增三重角色：教授 + AI实践者 + 图书馆专家
   - 语言多样化要求，禁止固定格式
   - 素材出题：仅从内容选取知识点，不测试篇章结构
   - 直接出题：随机主题池 + 多种语气风格
   - temperature 0.7→0.85, timeout 60s→300s

4. Docker切换为host网络模式
   - 解决DGX Spark上bridge网络无法访问宿主机vLLM的问题
   - nginx反向代理改用127.0.0.1:8000
   - 环境变量统一使用localhost

5. 新增系统管理员手册

fix: move API entry out of api/ so Vercel uses esbuild bundle

Vercel was compiling api/index.ts with its own compiler (no bundling)
instead of using the esbuild-generated api/index.js. Moved source to
server/_core/api-entry.ts so only the bundled JS exists in api/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add NWC (Nostr Wallet Connect) client for Lightning payments

Implements NIP-47 payment operations via npx @getalby/cli as a
lightweight subprocess backend (no native nostr-sdk required):
- get_balance() — wallet balance in sats/msat
- pay_invoice(bolt11) — pay with NWC_MAX_SATS spending cap (default 10k)
- create_invoice(amount_sat) — generate a Lightning invoice

Configurable via NWC_CONNECTION_STRING and NWC_MAX_SATS env vars.
Raises NWCError on missing config, payment failure, or subprocess timeout.

Fix: Send Proposal modal - remove navigate-away crash, in-app email composer, prevent double submit

Bug 1: Remove onNavigate('my-proposals') after proposal creation — that route was
deleted. Now shows ✅ success state for 1.6s then closes and calls onSuccess()
to refresh the proposals list in the card. No navigation, user stays on Hot Leads.

Bug 2: ProposalEmailModal no longer auto-fires mailto: — replaced 'Send Email'
with explicit [📋 Copy] and [📧 Open in Mail] buttons. User stays in-app;
removed the Netlify function fetch that was silently failing and triggering the
mailto: fallback automatically.

Bug 3: handleCreate now guards with `if (isSubmitting || !selectedPkg) return`
at the very top, plus loading spinner on the button, preventing double-submit
before React re-renders the disabled state.

Also: deleted duplicate draft proposal for hot_lead_id 278 created by double-click.

commit.message:
feat: add async Bitcoin/Lightning data client

Wraps mempool.space and blockchain.info APIs:
- get_price() — BTC/USD/EUR/GBP via blockchain.info ticker
- get_mempool_info() — unconfirmed tx count, vsize, recommended fee rates
- get_latest_block() / get_block() — block info by height or hash
- get_address_info() / get_address_txs() — on-chain balance and history
- get_tx() — transaction details
- decode_invoice() — bolt11 decode via mempool.space
- get_lightning_stats() — LN global statistics

All public APIs, no keys required.
